name: Brain MRI Dementia Protocol
description: Brain MRI protocol for dementia evaluation including volumetric analysis and hippocampal imaging

findings.technique: MRI brain with volumetric T1, FLAIR, and dedicated hippocampal sequences for dementia assessment.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Ventricular System
sections.content: Ventricles are [mildly dilated / normal in size / no hydrocephalus]. Ventricular enlargement is [proportional / out of proportion] to age.

sections.name: Hippocampi
sections.content: Hippocampal volumes [are preserved / show atrophy / are within normal limits]. No hippocampal sclerosis.

sections.name: White Matter
sections.content: White matter [shows no significant white matter disease / no extensive white matter hyperintensities / is unremarkable].

sections.name: Cortical Atrophy
sections.content: Cortical atrophy is [mild / moderate / severe / age-appropriate]. No focal cortical lesions.

impression:
1. No evidence of Alzheimer's-type pattern of atrophy.
2. No significant white matter disease.
3. Ventricular size is appropriate for age.
author: RadReport Templates
